name: FAI_TOPICS_VL
query: select B.TOPIC_ID, B.TOPIC_CODE, B.INTERNAL_NAME, B.INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION, B.STATUS, B.SEEDED_FLAG, B.OWNER_ID, B.OWNER_NAME, B.FAMILY, B.PRODUCT, B.TOPIC_CREATED_DATE, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION FROM FAI_TOPICS_B B, FAI_TOPICS_TL T WHERE B.TOPIC_ID = T.TOPIC_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
